manual_validation.evidence: Structurally proven: feedback send reuses the audited sealAndWrap NIP-59 gift-wrap path (the only send path in ContactChat). The existing DM e2e suite (dm-giftwrap-bell.spec.ts) already proves relay opacity for this exact pipeline. No separate unencrypted feedback path exists. User-authorized waive 2026-06-15.

Examiner re-verification Q2 confirmed (confidence 1.0) the marker tags land on the inner rumor before sealAndWrap, never on the outer kind-1059 wrap. wrapEvent encrypts rumor.tags into the kind-13 seal. User-authorized waive 2026-06-15.

gate_runs.detail: Epic new code clean: maintainer.ts 0.837 (residuals equivalent/attribution-artifact), directMessages.ts new code (feedbackMarkerTags+extraTags L303) covered. 40 gap-closing tests written. directMessages real-gaps are pre-existing out-of-scope code; L262 Mallory-binding security gap filed as backlog finding dm-gift-wrap-mallory-pubkey-binding (ACCEPT).

dm-feedback-channel.spec.ts: 3/3 pass (settings→/feedback nav, walled-garden seeding admits maintainer reply AC-REPLY-2, bell routes to /feedback AC-NOTIFY-2, maintainer hidden from contacts AC-CONTACT-1). Maintainer reply published through-app. 3 test-assertion fixes during gate (trailing-slash URLs, dual-bell locator).

5 substantive Codex rounds, converged. Fixed: config fallback-to-default (AC-CONFIG-3), feedback image/paste/drop gating + reactions gating (text-only §7), contacts detail-route maintainer bypass→/feedback redirect, query-param array crash, env-dependent test isolation. Standing item disclosed: multi/secondary-maintainer thread routing is spec-deferred (§4.5/§7, cannot occur with single active maintainer). Final confirmation runs blocked by transient Codex infra error.
